## Description

Brief summary of changes and why they're needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Dependency update

## Related Issues

Closes #

## Checklist

- [ ] `just check` passes (format, lint, test)
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated for changed code
- [ ] Integration tests pass (`just integration`) if API behaviour changed
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, CONTRIBUTING, etc.) if applicable
- [ ] No credentials or secrets in the diff
- [ ] Australian English used in all public-facing text
